## What & why

What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## How it was tested

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (lint + Vitest)
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (if behavior/UI changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (`[Unreleased]`) for anything user-visible

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out: tradeoffs, follow-ups, areas you're unsure about, or things
intentionally left out of scope.

## Checklist

- [ ] Diff is focused (one logical change)
- [ ] Matches surrounding code style and conventions
- [ ] If UI changed, it follows `DESIGN.md`
- [ ] If translations changed, `en` and `zh-CN` are in key parity
